Emerging from her tree trunk, bark splitting open around her shoulders as she steps forward into moonlight.
Pressing both palms flat against dark soil, thick roots erupting outward in spiraling patterns from her fingertips.
Lifting a fallen branch and fusing it back to the tree, green light glowing where wood reconnects.
Stretching upward after centuries of stillness, ancient bark cracking and peeling along her extended arms.
Extending root-like fingers deep into earth, connecting with the sprawling mycelium network beneath the forest.
Turning her face toward a golden shaft of sunlight, fresh leaves unfurling slowly from her flowing hair.
Wrapping her arms around her tree trunk in embrace, body merging seamlessly back into the textured bark.
Catching a falling bird's nest mid-air with cupped hands, placing it gently onto a high branch.
Standing motionless as vibrant moss grows across her shoulders and down her spine in accelerated time.
Pulling water upward through the ground with a sweeping gesture, a clear spring bubbling at her feet.
Shedding crimson autumn leaves from her skin as she walks slowly through the shadowed grove.
Growing new branches from her fingertips, wooden limbs reaching upward toward the distant canopy.
Pressing her forehead against oak bark, whispering commands as the tree bends its massive trunk.
Kneeling to touch a withered sapling, green life flooding back through its brittle gray branches.
Raising one hand skyward, drawing down rain clouds that gather above the forest clearing.
Weaving her fingers through hanging vines, braiding them into living patterns across the tree.
Breathing out visible pollen that drifts through sunbeams, pollinating flowers across the entire clearing.
Stepping backward into her tree, body becoming translucent as bark closes over her form.
Cracking open a seed pod in her palm, saplings sprouting instantly between her root-veined fingers.
Calling forth thorned vines from the ground that coil protectively around her ancient tree.
Touching a lightning-scarred trunk, drawing the char away as healthy wood grows beneath her hands.
Releasing a swarm of glowing spores from her mouth that illuminate the darkened forest floor.
Spreading her arms wide, commanding the canopy above to part and admit shafts of light.
Plunging her hand into solid rock, extracting mineral-rich water that pools in her wooden palm.
Transforming her legs into massive roots that anchor deep into the earth as she stands watch.
